form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (22.95) at Ballarat in a T3 RSTW, finishing seventh and beaten 8 lengths. Yet to win but has placed two times from this draw. Has ability and should feature.

form.formComment: Far too good last start to win by 7 lengths at this track over 425m (23.93) beating Clyde Bale in Bottom Up - Grade 6 on April 15. Recorded two placings in a row before she was rewarded with a win most recently. Expected to go well again.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when second (22.66) over 390m at Warrnambool. Has a low draw. Deserves respect.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th in a Bottom Up - Restricted Win on April 15 over 500m at this track behind Paw Wylder beaten 4.5 lengths (28.82). Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.
